VASSAL.build.GameModule.ModuleOther1: All images copyright GMT and/or original owners
VASSAL.build.GameModule.description: (c) GMT Games. Official module for the Tactical Solitaire game by Ben Hull
VASSAL.build.GameModule.name: Fields of Fire

VASSAL.build.module.map.MassKeyCommand.name: Update Fire Missions pt 1
VASSAL.build.module.map.MassKeyCommand.reportFormat: Existing Incoming! and Air Strike VOF markers removed per 3.7.1.A

VASSAL.build.module.map.MassKeyCommand.name: Update Fire Missions pt 2
VASSAL.build.module.map.MassKeyCommand.reportFormat: Pending Fire Mission markers flipped to their active sides per 3.7.1.A

VASSAL.build.module.MultiActionButton.menuItems: Update Fire Missions pt 1,Update Fire Missions pt 2
VASSAL.build.module.MultiActionButton.tooltip: [Phase 3.7.1] Removes existing Incoming! and Air Strike VOF markers. Flips Pending Fire Mission markers to their active sides.

VASSAL.build.module.map.MassKeyCommand.name: Clean Up things marked cleanup = True

VASSAL.build.module.MultiActionButton.menuItems: Cleanup,Clear Exposed,Clear Unaware,Clear Finished,Clear Mines,Clear Activated,Clear Moving,Clear Fires 1,Clear Fires 2,Discard Action Cards
VASSAL.build.module.MultiActionButton.tooltip: [Phase 3.8] Remove Pyrotechnic, Illumination, Moved/Fired, Exposed, Moving, Concentrate Fire, Grenade, Grenade Miss (and more!) markers.
